hero.subtitle: Full-stack developer, studying Advanced Software Engineering, currently on a work-study program.

about.subtitle: // who am I
about.title: About Me
about.p1: Full-stack developer on a work-study program, I build applications end-to-end — from database to interface. What drives me: turning an idea into something that actually runs.
about.p2: Curiosity has led me to unexpected places — analyzing NASA telescope data, training neural networks to detect exoplanets. When a problem is interesting, I dig in.

exoplanet.desc: ML pipeline for exoplanet detection in NASA Kepler data. BLS → CNN → physical validation architecture. Deployed on Render + Vercel.

fx.desc: Real-time forex prediction dashboard with technical indicators and ML models.

solar.desc: Solar production forecasting app based on weather data. Currently in development.

contact.subtitle: // let's work together
contact.title: Contact Me
contact.desc: Available for work-study or permanent positions. Feel free to reach out.

scipline.d1: Key role in direct collaboration with the lead developer
scipline.d2: Maintenance of a commercial ERP (Flask, PHP, JavaScript)
scipline.d4: Adapting to client needs and understanding business logic
scipline.d5: Transforming business processes into code (e.g. treasury system)

compufirst.d1: Collaboration with sales and marketing teams
compufirst.d2: CRM adaptation based on business needs
